## Summary

Describe the user-visible behavior and why the change is needed.

## Compatibility

- [ ] No public YAML, PVA, Redis, or container contract changes
- [ ] Compatibility changes are documented and versioned appropriately
- [ ] Hot-reload and failure behavior remain safe

## Validation

List the exact build, test, config-check, and smoke-test commands that passed.

## Release note

State the changelog entry, or explain why none is needed.
